failure.error_msg: Stopwatch did not stop as expected. assert 10 == 9 + where 10 = int(LogicArray('001010', Range(5, 'downto', 0))) + where LogicArray('001010', Range(5, 'downto', 0)) = LogicArrayObject(dig_stopwatch.seconds).value + where LogicArrayObject(dig_stopwatch.seconds) = HierarchyObject(dig_stopwatch).seconds
